title: D8T - 500 Hour Service
description: Engine oil and filters hydraulic filter fuel filter track tension adjustment. Undercarriage inspection - 45% remaining. All systems operational. No deficiencies found.

title: CB10 - Post-Rollover Repair
description: 90-degree rollover September 4 2025. ROPS intact no structural damage. Replaced drum bearing right side. Hydraulic line repair right side. Replaced operator console plastic. Full function test passed. Machine returned to service.

title: W200 - 1000 Hour Service & Bit Replacement
description: Full 1000-hour service including conveyor belt inspection and tensioning. Replaced 184 cutting bits worn below spec. Engine service complete. Drum alignment verified. Production rate confirmed at spec.

title: AP1000F - Screed Service
description: Full screed reconditioning - replaced wear plates auger flights and tamper bar. Electrical harness inspection complete. Grade and slope controls calibrated. Ready for spring paving season.

title: A40G-2 Reverse Alarm Replacement
description: Reverse alarm below minimum 97dB at 5 meters per site inspection finding Jan 7 2026. Replaced with new Preco 1075 alarm 112dB. Tested and confirmed operational.

title: 140M3 - 250 Hour Service
description: Engine oil hydraulic oil circle gear oil change. Blade cutting edge at 40% - not replaced. Articulation joint grease. Circle drive motor checked. All operational.
